title: Record soft14 handoff16 and reserved3k densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft14 Handoff16 Reserved3k Contract

## Soft 14
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.14 with quality bias floor 0.12 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 16
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.16 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Reserved 3k
reserved context for hard blocking defaults to 3k for denser long-horizon reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
